notes: Large fashion e-commerce site. Complex header with search, auth, wishlist, cart. Heavy client-side rendering with React. Cookie consent modal. Gender-based navigation (Damen/Herren/Kinder). Size/filter complexity on search results pages. A/B testing causes DOM variation.

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search input with autocomplete suggestions and search submit

endpoints.label: Sign In / Account
endpoints.description: Account icon in header opening login page or account flyout

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Cart icon with item count badge linking to cart/checkout

endpoints.label: Wishlist
endpoints.description: Heart icon linking to saved items wishlist

endpoints.label: Gender Navigation
endpoints.description: Top-level navigation tabs: Damen, Herren, Kinder — each loads different product catalog
endpoints.selector_hint: nav a[href*='damen'], nav a[href*='herren'], nav a[href*='kinder']

endpoints.label: Category Mega-Menu
endpoints.description: Hover/click category navigation with nested subcategories (Schuhe, Bekleidung, Sport, etc.)

endpoints.label: Cookie Consent Modal
endpoints.description: GDPR consent modal with Accept All / Settings buttons on first visit

endpoints.label: Newsletter Signup
endpoints.description: Email input for newsletter subscription, often in footer or modal popup
